  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: March 15, 2026

Introduction

OpenAPI reference for the Rizquna Publishing platform, author portal, digital library, and administration APIs.

Base URL: http://localhost:9000 
This API reference is generated from the Laravel route layer and request validation rules.

It includes OpenAPI output for Swagger UI, ReDoc, downloadable PDF export, authentication notes, and route-specific rate-limiting guidance.

Authenticating requests

To authenticate requests, include an Authorization header with the value "Bearer Bearer {YOUR_SANCTUM_TOKEN}".

All authenticated endpoints are marked with a requires authentication badge in the documentation below.

Protected endpoints require a Laravel Sanctum bearer token in the Authorization header.

Endpoints

Handles the API request and renders the Swagger documentation view.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/documentation" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/documentation"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/documentation';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/documentation'
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('GET', url, headers=headers)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET api/documentation

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Handles the OAuth2 callback and retrieves the required file for the redirect.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/oauth2-callback" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/oauth2-callback"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/oauth2-callback';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

POST /api/v1/webhooks/payment Callback dari payment gateway (Midtrans/Xendit).

Middleware: verify.webhook:midtrans atau verify.webhook:xendit

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/webhooks/payment" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/webhooks/payment"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/webhooks/payment';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',

API Login - Returns token for SPA/Mobile Accepts: email, username, or login (auto-detect)

Request      

POST api/v1/auth/login

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Register a new user

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"password\": \"-0pBNvYgxw\",
    \"phone\": \"aykcmyuwpwlvqwrs\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "password": "-0pBNvYgxw",
    "phone": "aykcmyuwpwlvqwrs"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/register';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'password' => '-0pBNvYgxw',
            'phone' => 'aykcmyuwpwlvqwrs',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/v1/auth/register

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

email   string     

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

password   string     

Must be at least 8 characters. Example: -0pBNvYgxw

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: aykcmyuwpwlvqwrs

Send password reset link

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/forgot-password" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"gbailey@example.net\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/forgot-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "gbailey@example.net"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/forgot-password';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'email' => 'gbailey@example.net',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Reset password

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/reset-password" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"token\": \"architecto\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"password\": \"-0pBNvYgxw\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/reset-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "token": "architecto",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "password": "-0pBNvYgxw"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/reset-password';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',

        ],
        'json' => [
            'token' => 'architecto',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'password' => '-0pBNvYgxw',
        ],

);

Request      

POST api/v1/auth/reset-password

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

token   string

POST /api/v1/authors/register

Register a new author with complete profile. This creates both User and Author profile in one transaction.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"architecto\",
    \"username\": \"architecto\",
    \"email\": \"gbailey@example.net\",
    \"password\": \"|]|{+-\",
    \"phone\": \"architecto\",
    \"bio\": \"architecto\",
    \"bank_name\": \"architecto\",
    \"bank_account\": \"architecto\",
    \"bank_account_name\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "architecto",
    "username": "architecto",
    "email": "gbailey@example.net",
    "password": "|]|{+-",
    "phone": "architecto",
    "bio": "architecto",
    "bank_name": "architecto",
    "bank_account": "architecto",
    "bank_account_name": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors/register';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'architecto',
            'username' => 'architecto',
            'email' => 'gbailey@example.net',
            'password' => '|]|{+-',
            'phone' => 'architecto',
            'bio' => 'architecto',
            'bank_name' => 'architecto',
            'bank_account' => 'architecto',
            'bank_account_name' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors/register'
payload = {
    "name": "architecto",
    "username": "architecto",
    "email": "gbailey@example.net",
    "password": "|]|{+-",
    "phone": "architecto",
    "bio": "architecto",
    "bank_name": "architecto",
    "bank_account": "architecto",
    "bank_account_name": "architecto"
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()

Example response (201):


{
    "success": true,
    "message": "Registrasi berhasil. Silakan login dengan email dan password Anda.",
    "data": {
        "user_id": 1,
        "email": "author@example.com",
        "author_id": 1,
        "status": "pending_verification"
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/authors/register

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Full name Example: architecto

username   string     

Unique username (min 3 chars) Example: architecto

email   string     

Valid email (unique) Example: gbailey@example.net

password   string     

Min 8 chars, must be confirmed Example: |]|{+-

phone   string     

Phone/WhatsApp number Example: architecto

bio   string  optional    

nullable Author biography Example: architecto

bank_name   string     

Bank name for royalty payments Example: architecto

bank_account   string     

Bank account number Example: architecto

bank_account_name   string     

Bank account holder name Example: architecto

GET /api/v1/authors/check-username

Check if username is available.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors/check-username" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"username\": \"b\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors/check-username"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "username": "b"
};

    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'username' => 'b',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

GET /api/v1/auth/google/callback Handle the callback from Google, create/login user, return token.

SECURITY FIXES:

  1. Prevent account takeover (email enumeration)
  2. Use fragment (#) instead of query (?) for token
  3. Remove stateless() for CSRF protection
Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/google/callback" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

);

        ],
    ]
);

print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Track a book by tracking code.

Public endpoint — no authentication required.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/tracking" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"b\"
}"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/tracking"
);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "b"
};

    method: "GET",

}).then(response => response.json());

            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'code' => 'b',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

GET /api/v1/public/catalog/grouped Returns books grouped by category for the homepage.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/catalog/grouped" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/catalog/grouped"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/catalog/grouped';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/catalog/grouped'
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('GET', url, headers=headers)
response.json()
Received response:

    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

);

Change password (supports first-time mandatory change)

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/change-password" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"current_password\": \"architecto\",
    \"new_password\": \"ngzmiyvdljnikhwaykcmyuwpwl\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/change-password"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "current_password": "architecto",
    "new_password": "ngzmiyvdljnikhwaykcmyuwpwl"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/change-password';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'current_password' => 'architecto',
            'new_password' => 'ngzmiyvdljnikhwaykcmyuwpwl',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/auth/change-password'
payload = {
    "current_password": "architecto",
    "new_password": "ngzmiyvdljnikhwaykcmyuwpwl"
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/auth/change-password

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

current_password   string     

Example: architecto

new_password   string     

The value and current_password must be different. Must match the regex /[A-Z]/. Must match the regex /[0-9]/. Must be at least 8 characters. Example: ngzmiyvdljnikhwaykcmyuwpwl

POST /api/v1/user/request-author-verification User mengajukan verifikasi sebagai penulis.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/request-author-verification" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"bio\": \"n\",
    \"phone\": \"gzmiyvdljnikhway\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/request-author-verification"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "bio": "n",
    "phone": "gzmiyvdljnikhway",
    "address": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/request-author-verification';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'bio' => 'n',
            'phone' => 'gzmiyvdljnikhway',
            'address' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/v1/user/request-author-verification

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

bio   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: n

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: gzmiyvdljnikhway

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

social_links   object  optional

Request      

POST api/v1/books/{book_id}/purchase

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

book_id   integer     

The ID of the book. Example: 3

Body Parameters

access_type   string  optional    

Example: permanent

Must be one of:
  • permanent
  • rental_30d
  • rental_90d
  • rental_365d
payment_method   string  optional    

Example: midtrans

Must be one of:
  • midtrans

savedSearch_id   integer     

The ID of the savedSearch. Example: 16

Get consolidated stats for the React Dashboard.

This single endpoint now returns summary + workflow + trend

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/dashboard-stats" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/dashboard-stats"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/dashboard-stats';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Create a new user.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"username\": \"i\",
    \"phone\": \"yvdljnikhwaykcmy\",
    \"password\": \"kXaz<m\",
    \"role\": \"architecto\",
    \"is_active\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "username": "i",
    "phone": "yvdljnikhwaykcmy",
    "password": "kXaz<m",
    "role": "architecto",
    "is_active": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'username' => 'i',
            'phone' => 'yvdljnikhwaykcmy',
            'password' => 'kXaz<m',
            'role' => 'architecto',
            'is_active' => false,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users'
payload = {
    "name": "b",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "username": "i",
    "phone": "yvdljnikhwaykcmy",
    "password": "kXaz<m",
    "role": "architecto",
    "is_active": false
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/users

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

email   string     

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

username   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: i

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: yvdljnikhwaykcmy

password   string     

Must be at least 8 characters. Example: kXaz<m

role   string     

The name of an existing record in the roles table. Example: architecto

is_active   boolean  optional    

Dynamic validation from DB. Example: false

Update the specified user.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users/5" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"username\": \"i\",
    \"phone\": \"yvdljnikhwaykcmy\",
    \"password\": \"kXaz<m\",
    \"role\": \"architecto\",
    \"is_active\": true,
    \"is_verified_author\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users/5"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "username": "i",
    "phone": "yvdljnikhwaykcmy",
    "password": "kXaz<m",
    "role": "architecto",
    "is_active": true,
    "is_verified_author": true
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/users/5';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'username' => 'i',
            'phone' => 'yvdljnikhwaykcmy',
            'password' => 'kXaz<m',
            'role' => 'architecto',
            'is_active' => true,
            'is_verified_author' => true,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

    "password": "kXaz<m",
    "role": "architecto",
    "is_active": true,
    "is_verified_author": true
}

Request      

PUT api/v1/admin/users/{user_id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

user_id   integer     

The ID of the user. Example: 5

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

username   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: i

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: yvdljnikhwaykcmy

password   string  optional    

Must be at least 8 characters. Example: kXaz<m

role   string  optional    

The name of an existing record in the roles table. Example: architecto

is_active   boolean  optional    

Dynamic validation. Example: true

is_verified_author   boolean  optional    

Example: true

        ],
    ]
);

Get author statistics.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/stats" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/stats"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/stats';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

GET api/v1/admin/authors

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Store a new author.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"pen_name\": \"n\",
    \"email\": \"ashly64@example.com\",
    \"phone\": \"vdljnikhwaykcmyu\",
    \"nik\": \"wpwlvqwrsitcpscq\",
    \"bio\": \"architecto\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\",
    \"city\": \"n\",
    \"province\": \"g\",
    \"postal_code\": \"zmiyvd\",
    \"bank_name\": \"l\",
    \"bank_account\": \"j\",
    \"bank_account_name\": \"n\",
    \"npwp\": \"i\",
    \"royalty_percentage\": 8,
    \"status\": \"inactive\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "pen_name": "n",
    "email": "ashly64@example.com",
    "phone": "vdljnikhwaykcmyu",
    "nik": "wpwlvqwrsitcpscq",
    "bio": "architecto",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvd",
    "bank_name": "l",
    "bank_account": "j",
    "bank_account_name": "n",
    "npwp": "i",
    "royalty_percentage": 8,
    "status": "inactive"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'pen_name' => 'n',
            'email' => 'ashly64@example.com',
            'phone' => 'vdljnikhwaykcmyu',
            'nik' => 'wpwlvqwrsitcpscq',
            'bio' => 'architecto',
            'address' => 'architecto',
            'city' => 'n',
            'province' => 'g',
            'postal_code' => 'zmiyvd',
            'bank_name' => 'l',
            'bank_account' => 'j',
            'bank_account_name' => 'n',
            'npwp' => 'i',
            'royalty_percentage' => 8,
            'status' => 'inactive',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    "bio": "architecto",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvd",
    "bank_name": "l",
    "bank_account": "j",
    "bank_account_name": "n",
    "npwp": "i",

    "status": "inactive"
}

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/authors

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

pen_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

email   string     

Must be a valid email address. Example: ashly64@example.com

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: vdljnikhwaykcmyu

nik   string  optional    

Must be 16 characters. Example: wpwlvqwrsitcpscq

bio   string  optional    

Example: architecto

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

city   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

province   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: g

postal_code   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: zmiyvd

bank_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: l

bank_account   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: j

bank_account_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

npwp   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 30 characters. Example: i

royalty_percentage   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 8

status   string  optional    

Example: inactive

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive

Show author detail.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Update an author.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"pen_name\": \"n\",
    \"phone\": \"gzmiyvdljnikhway\",
    \"bio\": \"architecto\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\",
    \"city\": \"n\",
    \"province\": \"g\",
    \"postal_code\": \"zmiyvd\",
    \"bank_name\": \"l\",
    \"bank_account\": \"j\",
    \"bank_account_name\": \"n\",
    \"npwp\": \"i\",
    \"royalty_percentage\": 8,
    \"status\": \"active\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "pen_name": "n",
    "phone": "gzmiyvdljnikhway",
    "bio": "architecto",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvd",
    "bank_name": "l",
    "bank_account": "j",
    "bank_account_name": "n",
    "npwp": "i",
    "royalty_percentage": 8,
    "status": "active"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'pen_name' => 'n',
            'phone' => 'gzmiyvdljnikhway',
            'bio' => 'architecto',
            'address' => 'architecto',
            'city' => 'n',
            'province' => 'g',
            'postal_code' => 'zmiyvd',
            'bank_name' => 'l',
            'bank_account' => 'j',
            'bank_account_name' => 'n',
            'npwp' => 'i',
            'royalty_percentage' => 8,
            'status' => 'active',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Delete an author (only if no books).

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/authors/5';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

GET api/v1/books/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The ID of the book. Example: 3

POST api/v1/books

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"b\",
    \"slug\": \"n\",
    \"type\": \"printing\",
    \"description\": \"Eius et animi quos velit et.\",
    \"price\": 60,
    \"stock\": 42,
    \"page_count\": 37,
    \"published_at\": \"2026-03-15T03:57:31\",
    \"published_year\": 16,
    \"status\": \"architecto\",
    \"is_featured\": true,
    \"is_digital\": true,
    \"isbn\": \"n\",
    \"marketplace_links\": [
        {
            \"product_url\": \"http:\\/\\/crooks.biz\\/et-fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "b",
    "slug": "n",
    "type": "printing",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "price": 60,
    "stock": 42,
    "page_count": 37,
    "published_at": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "published_year": 16,
    "status": "architecto",
    "is_featured": true,
    "is_digital": true,
    "isbn": "n",
    "marketplace_links": [
        {
            "product_url": "http:\/\/crooks.biz\/et-fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'title' => 'b',
            'slug' => 'n',
            'type' => 'printing',
            'description' => 'Eius et animi quos velit et.',
            'price' => 60,
            'stock' => 42,
            'page_count' => 37,
            'published_at' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31',
            'published_year' => 16,
            'status' => 'architecto',
            'is_featured' => true,
            'is_digital' => true,
            'isbn' => 'n',
            'marketplace_links' => [
                [
                    'product_url' => 'http://crooks.biz/et-fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium',
                ],
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/v1/books

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

slug   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

type   string  optional    

Example: printing

Must be one of:
  • publishing
  • printing
description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

category_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the categories table.

price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 60

stock   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 42

page_count   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 37

published_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

published_year   integer  optional    

Example: 16

status   string  optional    

Example: architecto

is_featured   boolean  optional    

Example: true

is_digital   boolean  optional    

Example: true

isbn   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: n

marketplace_links   object[]  optional    
marketplace_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the marketplaces table.

product_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://crooks.biz/et-fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium

PATCH api/v1/books/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"b\",
    \"description\": \"Eius et animi quos velit et.\",
    \"price\": 60,
    \"stock\": 42,
    \"page_count\": 37,
    \"published_at\": \"2026-03-15T03:57:31\",
    \"published_year\": 16,
    \"publisher\": \"n\",
    \"publisher_city\": \"g\",
    \"is_featured\": true,
    \"is_digital\": false,
    \"status\": \"architecto\",
    \"cover_path\": \"n\",
    \"pdf_full_path\": \"g\",
    \"marketplace_links\": [
        {
            \"product_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.okuneva.com\\/fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium-harum-mollitia.html\"
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "b",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "price": 60,
    "stock": 42,
    "page_count": 37,
    "published_at": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "published_year": 16,
    "publisher": "n",
    "publisher_city": "g",
    "is_featured": true,
    "is_digital": false,
    "status": "architecto",
    "cover_path": "n",
    "pdf_full_path": "g",
    "marketplace_links": [
        {
            "product_url": "http:\/\/www.okuneva.com\/fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium-harum-mollitia.html"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'title' => 'b',
            'description' => 'Eius et animi quos velit et.',
            'price' => 60,
            'stock' => 42,
            'page_count' => 37,
            'published_at' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31',
            'published_year' => 16,
            'publisher' => 'n',
            'publisher_city' => 'g',
            'is_featured' => true,
            'is_digital' => false,
            'status' => 'architecto',
            'cover_path' => 'n',
            'pdf_full_path' => 'g',
            'marketplace_links' => [
                [
                    'product_url' => 'http://www.okuneva.com/fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium-harum-mollitia.html',
                ],
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

);

);

);

POST api/v1/books/{id}/files

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3/files" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file_type=layout"\
    --form "notes=architecto"\
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpfo2v8hfnv3ol2OnBDgM" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3/files"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file_type', 'layout');
body.append('notes', 'architecto');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3/files';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'file_type',
                'contents' => 'layout'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'notes',
                'contents' => 'architecto'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'file',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpfo2v8hfnv3ol2OnBDgM', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

files = {
  'file_type': (None, 'layout'),
  'notes': (None, 'architecto'),
  'file': open('/tmp/phpfo2v8hfnv3ol2OnBDgM', 'rb')}
payload = {
    "file_type": "layout",
    "notes": "architecto"
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()

Request      

POST api/v1/books/{id}/files

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The ID of the book. Example: 3

Body Parameters

file   file     

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 51200 kilobytes. Example: /tmp/phpfo2v8hfnv3ol2OnBDgM

file_type   string     

50MB max. Example: layout

Must be one of:
  • manuscript
  • edited
  • layout
  • proof
  • isbn_cert
  • cover_final
  • print_ready
notes   string  optional    

Example: architecto

Trigger parse metadata akademik untuk buku tertentu.

PUT /api/v1/admin/settings/general Update general settings

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/general" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"company_name\": \"b\",
    \"company_logo\": \"n\",
    \"company_description\": \"architecto\",
    \"contact_email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"contact_phone\": \"i\",
    \"contact_address\": \"architecto\",
    \"social_facebook\": \"n\",
    \"social_instagram\": \"g\",
    \"social_linkedin\": \"z\",
    \"social_twitter\": \"m\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/general"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "company_name": "b",
    "company_logo": "n",
    "company_description": "architecto",
    "contact_email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "contact_phone": "i",
    "contact_address": "architecto",
    "social_facebook": "n",
    "social_instagram": "g",
    "social_linkedin": "z",
    "social_twitter": "m"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/general';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'company_name' => 'b',
            'company_logo' => 'n',
            'company_description' => 'architecto',
            'contact_email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'contact_phone' => 'i',
            'contact_address' => 'architecto',
            'social_facebook' => 'n',
            'social_instagram' => 'g',
            'social_linkedin' => 'z',
            'social_twitter' => 'm',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PUT api/v1/settings/general

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

company_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

company_logo   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: n

company_description   string  optional    

Example: architecto

contact_email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

contact_phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: i

contact_address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

social_facebook   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: n

social_instagram   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: g

social_linkedin   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: z

social_twitter   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: m

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

}).then(response => response.json());

    $url,

);

PUT /api/v1/admin/settings/publish Update publish settings

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/publish" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"default_royalty_percentage\": 1,
    \"minimum_withdrawal_balance\": 39,
    \"publishing_timeline_manuscript_review\": 67,
    \"publishing_timeline_editing\": 66,
    \"publishing_timeline_design\": 27,
    \"publishing_timeline_proofreading\": 35,
    \"publishing_timeline_printing\": 43
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/publish"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "default_royalty_percentage": 1,
    "minimum_withdrawal_balance": 39,
    "publishing_timeline_manuscript_review": 67,
    "publishing_timeline_editing": 66,
    "publishing_timeline_design": 27,
    "publishing_timeline_proofreading": 35,
    "publishing_timeline_printing": 43
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/publish';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'default_royalty_percentage' => 1,
            'minimum_withdrawal_balance' => 39,
            'publishing_timeline_manuscript_review' => 67,
            'publishing_timeline_editing' => 66,
            'publishing_timeline_design' => 27,
            'publishing_timeline_proofreading' => 35,
            'publishing_timeline_printing' => 43,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PUT api/v1/settings/publish

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

default_royalty_percentage   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 1

minimum_withdrawal_balance   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 39

payment_methods   object  optional    
publishing_timeline_manuscript_review   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 67

publishing_timeline_editing   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 66

publishing_timeline_design   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 27

publishing_timeline_proofreading   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 35

publishing_timeline_printing   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 43

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/faqs" \

    \"question\": \"b\",
    \"answer\": \"architecto\",
    \"category\": \"technical\",
    \"sort_order\": 16,
    \"is_active\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/faqs"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "question": "b",
    "answer": "architecto",
    "category": "technical",
    "sort_order": 16,
    "is_active": true
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

curl --request DELETE \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/testimonials/architecto" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/testimonials/architecto"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/testimonials/architecto';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response.json()

POST /api/v1/admin/settings/banners Create new banner

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"b\",
    \"image\": \"n\",
    \"description\": \"Eius et animi quos velit et.\",
    \"link\": \"v\",
    \"cta_text\": \"d\",
    \"schedule_from\": \"2026-03-15T03:57:31\",
    \"schedule_to\": \"2052-04-07\",
    \"sort_order\": 16,
    \"is_active\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "b",
    "image": "n",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "link": "v",
    "cta_text": "d",
    "schedule_from": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "schedule_to": "2052-04-07",
    "sort_order": 16,
    "is_active": true
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'title' => 'b',
            'image' => 'n',
            'description' => 'Eius et animi quos velit et.',
            'link' => 'v',
            'cta_text' => 'd',
            'schedule_from' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31',
            'schedule_to' => '2052-04-07',
            'sort_order' => 16,
            'is_active' => true,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners'
payload = {
    "title": "b",
    "image": "n",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "link": "v",
    "cta_text": "d",
    "schedule_from": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "schedule_to": "2052-04-07",
    "sort_order": 16,
    "is_active": true
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/settings/banners

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

image   string     

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: n

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

link   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: v

cta_text   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: d

schedule_from   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

schedule_to   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after schedule_from. Example: 2052-04-07

sort_order   integer  optional    

Example: 16

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

PUT /api/v1/admin/settings/banners/{id} Update banner

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners/architecto" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"b\",
    \"image\": \"n\",
    \"description\": \"Eius et animi quos velit et.\",
    \"link\": \"v\",
    \"cta_text\": \"d\",
    \"schedule_from\": \"2026-03-15T03:57:31\",
    \"schedule_to\": \"2052-04-07\",
    \"sort_order\": 16,
    \"is_active\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners/architecto"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "b",
    "image": "n",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "link": "v",
    "cta_text": "d",
    "schedule_from": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "schedule_to": "2052-04-07",
    "sort_order": 16,
    "is_active": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/settings/banners/architecto';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'title' => 'b',
            'image' => 'n',
            'description' => 'Eius et animi quos velit et.',
            'link' => 'v',
            'cta_text' => 'd',
            'schedule_from' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31',
            'schedule_to' => '2052-04-07',
            'sort_order' => 16,
            'is_active' => false,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the banner. Example: architecto

Body Parameters

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

image   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: n

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

link   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: v

cta_text   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: d

schedule_from   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

schedule_to   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after schedule_from. Example: 2052-04-07

sort_order   integer  optional    

Example: 16

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Headers

Content-Type

URL Parameters

Update status of a publishing request (state machine transition).

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto/status" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"status\": \"architecto\",
    \"notes\": \"n\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": "architecto",
    "notes": "n"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto/status';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'status' => 'architecto',
            'notes' => 'n',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PATCH api/v1/publishing-requests/{id}/status

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the publishing request. Example: architecto

Body Parameters

status   string     

Example: architecto

notes   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 1000 characters. Example: n

Add admin/editor notes to a publishing request.

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto/notes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"editor_notes\": \"architecto\",
    \"admin_notes\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto/notes"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "editor_notes": "architecto",
    "admin_notes": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/publishing-requests/architecto/notes';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'editor_notes' => 'architecto',
            'admin_notes' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

POST api/v1/authors

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"phone\": \"i\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "phone": "i",
    "address": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/authors';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'phone' => 'i',
            'address' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

POST api/v1/authors

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: i

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

Request      

GET api/v1/contracts/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the contract. Example: architecto

POST api/v1/contracts

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "book_id=16"\
    --form "start_date=2026-03-15T03:57:31"\
    --form "end_date=2052-04-07"\
    --form "royalty_percentage=22"\
    --form "contract_file=@/tmp/phpc5t9ss1iq3k34ldIHOc" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('book_id', '16');
body.append('start_date', '2026-03-15T03:57:31');
body.append('end_date', '2052-04-07');
body.append('royalty_percentage', '22');
body.append('contract_file', document.querySelector('input[name="contract_file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'book_id',
                'contents' => '16'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'start_date',
                'contents' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'end_date',
                'contents' => '2052-04-07'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'royalty_percentage',
                'contents' => '22'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'contract_file',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpc5t9ss1iq3k34ldIHOc', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts'
files = {
  'book_id': (None, '16'),
  'start_date': (None, '2026-03-15T03:57:31'),
  'end_date': (None, '2052-04-07'),
  'royalty_percentage': (None, '22'),
  'contract_file': open('/tmp/phpc5t9ss1iq3k34ldIHOc', 'rb')}
payload = {
    "book_id": 16,
    "start_date": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "end_date": "2052-04-07",
    "royalty_percentage": 22
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/contracts

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

book_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the books table. Example: 16

start_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

end_date   string     

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after start_date. Example: 2052-04-07

royalty_percentage   number     

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 22

contract_file   file     

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 10240 kilobytes. Example: /tmp/phpc5t9ss1iq3k34ldIHOc

PATCH api/v1/contracts/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts/architecto" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-03-15T03:57:31\",
    \"end_date\": \"2052-04-07\",
    \"royalty_percentage\": 22,
    \"status\": \"approved\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts/architecto"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "end_date": "2052-04-07",
    "royalty_percentage": 22,
    "status": "approved"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts/architecto';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'start_date' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31',
            'end_date' => '2052-04-07',
            'royalty_percentage' => 22,
            'status' => 'approved',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

payload = {
    "start_date": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "end_date": "2052-04-07",
    "royalty_percentage": 22,
    "status": "approved"
}

  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('PATCH', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()

Request      

PATCH api/v1/contracts/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the contract. Example: architecto

Body Parameters

book_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the books table.

start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after start_date. Example: 2052-04-07

royalty_percentage   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 100. Example: 22

status   string  optional    

Example: approved

Must be one of:
  • pending
  • approved
  • rejected
  • expired

PUT api/v1/contracts/{id}/approve

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts/architecto/approve" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/contracts/architecto/approve"
);

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

}).then(response => response.json());

    $url,

);

print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

POST api/v1/admin/book-access

Headers

Content-Type

Example: application/json

The id of an existing record in the books table. Example: architecto

Must not be greater than 500 characters. Example: n

expires_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after now. Example: 2052-04-07

Request      

GET api/v1/sales

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Store a new sale.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/sales" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"book_id\": \"architecto\",
    \"marketplace_id\": \"architecto\",
    \"transaction_id\": \"n\",
    \"period_month\": \"4255-12\",
    \"quantity\": 40,
    \"net_price\": 9,
    \"status\": \"completed\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/sales"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "book_id": "architecto",
    "marketplace_id": "architecto",
    "transaction_id": "n",
    "period_month": "4255-12",
    "quantity": 40,
    "net_price": 9,
    "status": "completed"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/sales';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'book_id' => 'architecto',
            'marketplace_id' => 'architecto',
            'transaction_id' => 'n',
            'period_month' => '4255-12',
            'quantity' => 40,
            'net_price' => 9,
            'status' => 'completed',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/v1/sales

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

book_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the books table. Example: architecto

marketplace_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the marketplaces table. Example: architecto

transaction_id   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

period_month   string     

Must match the regex /^\d{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$/. Example: 4255-12

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 40

net_price   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 9

status   string  optional    

Example: completed

Must be one of:
  • completed
  • refunded

Get sales statistics.

    [

        ],
    ]
);

print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

GET api/v1/print-orders

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Store a new print order.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/print-orders" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"book_id\": \"architecto\",
    \"vendor_name\": \"n\",
    \"vendor_contact\": \"g\",
    \"quantity\": 66,
    \"unit_cost\": 77,
    \"paper_type\": \"i\",
    \"binding_type\": \"y\",
    \"cover_type\": \"v\",
    \"page_count\": 26,
    \"size\": \"l\",
    \"status\": \"approved\",
    \"ordered_at\": \"2026-03-15T03:57:31\",
    \"expected_delivery\": \"2052-04-07\",
    \"notes\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/print-orders"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "book_id": "architecto",
    "vendor_name": "n",
    "vendor_contact": "g",
    "quantity": 66,
    "unit_cost": 77,
    "paper_type": "i",
    "binding_type": "y",
    "cover_type": "v",
    "page_count": 26,
    "size": "l",
    "status": "approved",
    "ordered_at": "2026-03-15T03:57:31",
    "expected_delivery": "2052-04-07",
    "notes": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/print-orders';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'book_id' => 'architecto',
            'vendor_name' => 'n',
            'vendor_contact' => 'g',
            'quantity' => 66,
            'unit_cost' => 77,
            'paper_type' => 'i',
            'binding_type' => 'y',
            'cover_type' => 'v',
            'page_count' => 26,
            'size' => 'l',
            'status' => 'approved',
            'ordered_at' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31',
            'expected_delivery' => '2052-04-07',
            'notes' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/v1/print-orders

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

book_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the books table. Example: architecto

vendor_name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

vendor_contact   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: g

quantity   integer     

Must be at least 1. Example: 66

unit_cost   number     

Must be at least 0. Example: 77

paper_type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: i

binding_type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: y

cover_type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: v

page_count   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 26

size   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: l

status   string  optional    

Example: approved

Must be one of:
  • pending
  • approved
  • in_production
  • qc
  • delivered
  • cancelled
ordered_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

expected_delivery   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Must be a date after or equal to ordered_at. Example: 2052-04-07

notes   string  optional    

Example: architecto

Update print order status.

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/print-orders/16/status" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"status\": \"cancelled\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/print-orders/16/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": "cancelled"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/print-orders/16/status';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'status' => 'cancelled',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PATCH api/v1/print-orders/{order_id}/status

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

order_id   integer     

The ID of the order. Example: 16

Body Parameters

status   string     

Example: cancelled

Must be one of:
  • pending
  • approved

POST api/v1/sales/import

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/sales/import" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "period_month=4255-12"\
    --form "marketplace_code=l"\
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpilrm4hvnlpc83fGAGIf" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/sales/import"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('period_month', '4255-12');
body.append('marketplace_code', 'l');
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/sales/import';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'period_month',
                'contents' => '4255-12'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'marketplace_code',
                'contents' => 'l'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'file',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpilrm4hvnlpc83fGAGIf', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

}
