Request      

POST api/v1/sales/import

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

period_month   string     

Must match the regex /^\d{4}-(0[1-9]|1[0-2])$/. Example: 4255-12

marketplace_code   string     

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: l

file   file     

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 10240 kilobytes. Example: /tmp/phpilrm4hvnlpc83fGAGIf

Request      

POST api/v1/website/content

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

section   string     

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: b

key   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

value   string  optional    

Example: architecto

type   string  optional    

Example: html

Must be one of:
  • text
  • html
  • json
  • image
sort_order   integer  optional    

Example: 16

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: false

POST /api/v1/admin/site-content/bulk Bulk upsert site content (used by the CMS editor).

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/website/content/bulk" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{

        {
            \"section\": \"b\",
            \"key\": \"n\",
            \"value\": \"architecto\",
            \"type\": \"html\"
        }
    ]
}"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/website/content/bulk"
);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "items": [
        {
            "section": "b",
            "key": "n",
            "value": "architecto",
            "type": "html"
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

                    'key' => 'n',

            ],

    ]
);

POST api/v1/website/testimonials

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: b

role   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

institution   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 200 characters. Example: g

content   string     

Example: architecto

avatar_url   string  optional    

Example: http://www.bailey.biz/quos-velit-et-fugiat-sunt-nihil-accusantium-harum.html

rating   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Must not be greater than 5. Example: 5

is_featured   boolean  optional    

Example: false

is_active   boolean  optional    

Example: true

sort_order   integer  optional    

Example: 16

}"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/royalties/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "items": [
        {
            "id": "architecto",
            "royalty_percentage": 22
        }

};

);

PUT api/v1/payments/{payment_id}/mark-paid

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/payments/16/mark-paid" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "payment_reference=b"\
    --form "paid_at=2026-03-15T03:57:31"\
    --form "payment_proof=@/tmp/phpb9813bkdkplc6kFlfeh" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/payments/16/mark-paid"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('payment_reference', 'b');
body.append('paid_at', '2026-03-15T03:57:31');
body.append('payment_proof', document.querySelector('input[name="payment_proof"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/payments/16/mark-paid';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'payment_reference',
                'contents' => 'b'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'paid_at',
                'contents' => '2026-03-15T03:57:31'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'payment_proof',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpb9813bkdkplc6kFlfeh', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

}

PUT api/v1/payments/{payment_id}/mark-paid

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

payment_id   integer     

The ID of the payment. Example: 16

Body Parameters

payment_reference   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

paid_at   string  optional    

Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-15T03:57:31

payment_proof   file  optional    

Must be a file. Must be an image. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: /tmp/phpb9813bkdkplc6kFlfeh

Get books with filters (Refactored for efficiency)

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/dashboard/books" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/dashboard/books"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/dashboard/books';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/dashboard/books'
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('GET', url, headers=headers)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/dashboard/books

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Get consolidated stats for the React Dashboard.

This single endpoint now returns summary + workflow + trend

PATCH api/v1/user/profile

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"pen_name\": \"n\",
    \"nik\": \"gzmiyvdljnikhway\",
    \"bio\": \"architecto\",
    \"phone\": \"ngzmiyvdljnikhwa\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\",
    \"city\": \"n\",
    \"province\": \"g\",
    \"postal_code\": \"zmiyvd\",
    \"bank_name\": \"l\",
    \"bank_account\": \"j\",
    \"bank_account_name\": \"n\",
    \"npwp\": \"ikhwaykcmyuwpwlv\",
    \"social_links\": {
        \"website\": \"q\",
        \"instagram\": \"w\",
        \"twitter\": \"r\",
        \"facebook\": \"s\"
    },
    \"language\": \"itcpsc\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "pen_name": "n",
    "nik": "gzmiyvdljnikhway",
    "bio": "architecto",
    "phone": "ngzmiyvdljnikhwa",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvd",
    "bank_name": "l",
    "bank_account": "j",
    "bank_account_name": "n",
    "npwp": "ikhwaykcmyuwpwlv",
    "social_links": {
        "website": "q",
        "instagram": "w",
        "twitter": "r",
        "facebook": "s"
    },
    "language": "itcpsc"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'pen_name' => 'n',
            'nik' => 'gzmiyvdljnikhway',
            'bio' => 'architecto',
            'phone' => 'ngzmiyvdljnikhwa',
            'address' => 'architecto',
            'city' => 'n',
            'province' => 'g',
            'postal_code' => 'zmiyvd',
            'bank_name' => 'l',
            'bank_account' => 'j',
            'bank_account_name' => 'n',
            'npwp' => 'ikhwaykcmyuwpwlv',
            'social_links' => [
                'website' => 'q',
                'instagram' => 'w',
                'twitter' => 'r',
                'facebook' => 's',
            ],
            'language' => 'itcpsc',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile'
payload = {
    "name": "b",
    "pen_name": "n",
    "nik": "gzmiyvdljnikhway",
    "bio": "architecto",
    "phone": "ngzmiyvdljnikhwa",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvd",
    "bank_name": "l",
    "bank_account": "j",
    "bank_account_name": "n",
    "npwp": "ikhwaykcmyuwpwlv",
    "social_links": {
        "website": "q",
        "instagram": "w",
        "twitter": "r",
        "facebook": "s"
    },
    "language": "itcpsc"
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('PATCH', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

PATCH api/v1/user/profile

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

pen_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

nik   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 16 characters. Example: gzmiyvdljnikhway

bio   string  optional    

Example: architecto

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: ngzmiyvdljnikhwa

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

city   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

province   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: g

postal_code   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: zmiyvd

bank_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: l

bank_account   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: j

bank_account_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

npwp   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: ikhwaykcmyuwpwlv

social_links   object  optional    
website   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: q

instagram   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: w

twitter   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: r

facebook   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: s

language   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 10 characters. Example: itcpsc

POST api/v1/user/profile/upload-ktp

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile/upload-ktp" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "ktp_photo=@/tmp/phpc5r61alefs4q8GaIDcn" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile/upload-ktp"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('ktp_photo', document.querySelector('input[name="ktp_photo"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile/upload-ktp';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'ktp_photo',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpc5r61alefs4q8GaIDcn', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/profile/upload-ktp'
files = {
  'ktp_photo': open('/tmp/phpc5r61alefs4q8GaIDcn', 'rb')}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST api/v1/user/profile/upload-ktp

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

ktp_photo   file     

Must be an image. Must not be greater than 2048 kilobytes. Example: /tmp/phpc5r61alefs4q8GaIDcn

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/books" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/books"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/books';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

PATCH api/v1/user/books/{book}

Example request:
curl --request PATCH \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/books/3" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"b\",
    \"description\": \"Eius et animi quos velit et.\",
    \"price\": 60,
    \"cover_path\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/books/3"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "b",
    "description": "Eius et animi quos velit et.",
    "price": 60,
    "cover_path": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PATCH",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/books/3';
$response = $client->patch(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'title' => 'b',
            'description' => 'Eius et animi quos velit et.',
            'price' => 60,
            'cover_path' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PATCH api/v1/user/books/{book}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

book   integer     

The book. Example: 3

Body Parameters

title   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

description   string  optional    

Example: Eius et animi quos velit et.

price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 60

cover_path   string  optional    

Example: architecto

POST api/v1/user/print-orders

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/print-orders" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"book_id\": \"architecto\",
    \"quantity\": 22,
    \"notes\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/print-orders"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "book_id": "architecto",
    "quantity": 22,
    "notes": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/print-orders';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'book_id' => 'architecto',
            'quantity' => 22,
            'notes' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

);

};

}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

GET api/v1/user/publishing-requests

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

POST api/v1/user/publishing-requests

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/publishing-requests" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "title=b"\
    --form "synopsis=architecto"\
    --form "genre=n"\
    --form "manuscript=@/tmp/phpk7a23kone4bv9hkgDfo" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/publishing-requests"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('title', 'b');
body.append('synopsis', 'architecto');
body.append('genre', 'n');
body.append('manuscript', document.querySelector('input[name="manuscript"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/publishing-requests';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'title',
                'contents' => 'b'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'synopsis',
                'contents' => 'architecto'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'genre',
                'contents' => 'n'
            ],
            [
                'name' => 'manuscript',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpk7a23kone4bv9hkgDfo', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/publishing-requests'
files = {
  'title': (None, 'b'),
  'synopsis': (None, 'architecto'),
  'genre': (None, 'n'),
  'manuscript': open('/tmp/phpk7a23kone4bv9hkgDfo', 'rb')}
payload = {
    "title": "b",
    "synopsis": "architecto",
    "genre": "n"
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/publishing-requests

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

synopsis   string     

Example: architecto

genre   string     

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

manuscript   file     

Must be a file. Must not be greater than 20480 kilobytes. Example: /tmp/phpk7a23kone4bv9hkgDfo

);

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "subtitle": "n",

};

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the manuscript. Example: architecto

PUT api/v1/user/manuscripts/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"b\",
    \"subtitle\": \"n\",
    \"synopsis\": \"architecto\",
    \"genre\": \"n\",
    \"target_audience\": \"architecto\",
    \"unique_selling_points\": \"architecto\",
    \"estimated_pages\": 22
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "b",
    "subtitle": "n",
    "synopsis": "architecto",
    "genre": "n",
    "target_audience": "architecto",
    "unique_selling_points": "architecto",
    "estimated_pages": 22
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'title' => 'b',
            'subtitle' => 'n',
            'synopsis' => 'architecto',
            'genre' => 'n',
            'target_audience' => 'architecto',
            'unique_selling_points' => 'architecto',
            'estimated_pages' => 22,
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto'
payload = {
    "title": "b",
    "subtitle": "n",
    "synopsis": "architecto",
    "genre": "n",
    "target_audience": "architecto",
    "unique_selling_points": "architecto",
    "estimated_pages": 22
}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('PUT', url, headers=headers, json=payload)
response.json()

Request      

PUT api/v1/user/manuscripts/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   string     

The ID of the manuscript. Example: architecto

Body Parameters

title   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

subtitle   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

synopsis   string  optional    

Example: architecto

genre   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

target_audience   string  optional    

Example: architecto

unique_selling_points   string  optional    

Example: architecto

table_of_contents   object  optional    
estimated_pages   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 22

DELETE api/v1/user/manuscripts/{id}

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto" \

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

}).then(response => response.json());

    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',

        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();

POST api/v1/user/manuscripts/{id}/upload

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto/upload" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/tmp/php0baq486omma4fEfdKGp" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto/upload"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto/upload';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'file',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/php0baq486omma4fEfdKGp', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/manuscripts/architecto/upload'
files = {
  'file': open('/tmp/php0baq486omma4fEfdKGp', 'rb')}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()

Headers

Content-Type

Accept        

Example: application/json

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/notification-preferences" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"notification_preferences\": {
        \"email_new_contract\": true,
        \"email_royalty_report\": true,
        \"email_book_status\": true,
        \"push_chat\": false
    }
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/notification-preferences"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "notification_preferences": {
        "email_new_contract": true,
        "email_royalty_report": true,
        "email_book_status": true,
        "push_chat": false
    }
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/user/notification-preferences';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'notification_preferences' => [
                'email_new_contract' => true,
                'email_royalty_report' => true,
                'email_book_status' => true,
                'push_chat' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/statistics" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/statistics"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/statistics';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Example: application/json

POST api/v1/percetakan/orders

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"customer_id\": 1,
    \"product_id\": 1,
    \"quantity\": 1000,
    \"deadline\": \"2026-03-22\",
    \"priority\": \"high\",
    \"is_rush_order\": false,
    \"specifications\": {
        \"size\": \"A4\",
        \"paper_type\": \"Art Paper\",
        \"paper_weight\": \"150 gsm\",
        \"colors_inside\": \"4\\/4\",
        \"colors_outside\": \"4\\/4\",
        \"binding_type\": \"perfect binding\",
        \"finishing\": \"glossy lamination\",
        \"pages_count\": 120
    },
    \"unit_price\": 15000,
    \"discount_amount\": 50000,
    \"deposit_percentage\": 50,
    \"production_notes\": \"Prioritaskan finishing glossy.\",
    \"customer_notes\": \"Kirim sebelum akhir bulan.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "customer_id": 1,
    "product_id": 1,
    "quantity": 1000,
    "deadline": "2026-03-22",
    "priority": "high",
    "is_rush_order": false,
    "specifications": {
        "size": "A4",
        "paper_type": "Art Paper",
        "paper_weight": "150 gsm",
        "colors_inside": "4\/4",
        "colors_outside": "4\/4",
        "binding_type": "perfect binding",
        "finishing": "glossy lamination",
        "pages_count": 120
    },
    "unit_price": 15000,
    "discount_amount": 50000,
    "deposit_percentage": 50,
    "production_notes": "Prioritaskan finishing glossy.",
    "customer_notes": "Kirim sebelum akhir bulan."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'customer_id' => 1,
            'product_id' => 1,
            'quantity' => 1000,
            'deadline' => '2026-03-22',
            'priority' => 'high',
            'is_rush_order' => false,
            'specifications' => [
                'size' => 'A4',
                'paper_type' => 'Art Paper',
                'paper_weight' => '150 gsm',
                'colors_inside' => '4/4',
                'colors_outside' => '4/4',
                'binding_type' => 'perfect binding',
                'finishing' => 'glossy lamination',
                'pages_count' => 120,
            ],
            'unit_price' => 15000.0,
            'discount_amount' => 50000.0,
            'deposit_percentage' => 50.0,
            'production_notes' => 'Prioritaskan finishing glossy.',
            'customer_notes' => 'Kirim sebelum akhir bulan.',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    },

Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/percetakan/orders

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

customer_id   string     

ID customer percetakan. The id of an existing record in the percetakan_customers table. Example: 1

product_id   string     

ID produk percetakan yang dipesan. The id of an existing record in the percetakan_products table. Example: 1

quantity   integer     

Jumlah unit yang dipesan. Must be at least 1. Example: 1000

deadline   string  optional    

Tanggal deadline produksi. Must be a valid date. Must be a date after today. Example: 2026-03-22

priority   string  optional    

Prioritas pengerjaan. Example: high

Must be one of:
  • low
  • normal
  • high
  • urgent
is_rush_order   boolean  optional    

Apakah order termasuk rush order. Example: false

specifications   object     

Objek spesifikasi cetak.
size   string     

Example: A4

paper_type   string     

Example: Art Paper

paper_weight   string     

Example: 150 gsm

colors_inside   string     

Example: 4/4

colors_outside   string     

Example: 4/4

binding_type   string  optional    

Example: perfect binding

finishing   string  optional    

Example: glossy lamination

pages_count   integer  optional    

Must be at least 1. Example: 120

unit_price   number     

Harga satuan per unit. Must be at least 0. Example: 15000

discount_amount   number  optional    

Nominal diskon order. Must be at least 0. Example: 50000

deposit_percentage   number  optional    

Persentase DP order. Must be between 0 and 100. Example: 50

production_notes   string  optional    

Catatan internal untuk produksi. Example: Prioritaskan finishing glossy.

customer_notes   string  optional    

Catatan dari customer. Example: Kirim sebelum akhir bulan.

GET api/v1/percetakan/orders/{id}

Example request:

    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

PUT api/v1/percetakan/orders/{id}

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"customer_id\": 2,
    \"product_id\": 3,
    \"quantity\": 1500,
    \"status\": \"confirmed\",
    \"deadline\": \"2026-03-25\",
    \"priority\": \"urgent\",
    \"is_rush_order\": true,
    \"specifications\": {
        \"size\": \"B5\",
        \"paper_type\": \"HVS\",
        \"paper_weight\": \"80 gsm\",
        \"colors_inside\": \"1\\/1\",
        \"colors_outside\": \"4\\/4\",
        \"binding_type\": \"staple\",
        \"finishing\": \"none\",
        \"pages_count\": 64
    },
    \"unit_price\": 17500,
    \"discount_amount\": 75000,
    \"deposit_percentage\": 60,
    \"deposit_paid\": 27,
    \"production_notes\": \"Ubah jadwal mesin ke batch malam.\",
    \"customer_notes\": \"Tambahkan packing kardus tebal.\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "customer_id": 2,
    "product_id": 3,
    "quantity": 1500,
    "status": "confirmed",
    "deadline": "2026-03-25",
    "priority": "urgent",
    "is_rush_order": true,
    "specifications": {
        "size": "B5",
        "paper_type": "HVS",
        "paper_weight": "80 gsm",
        "colors_inside": "1\/1",
        "colors_outside": "4\/4",
        "binding_type": "staple",
        "finishing": "none",
        "pages_count": 64
    },
    "unit_price": 17500,
    "discount_amount": 75000,
    "deposit_percentage": 60,
    "deposit_paid": 27,
    "production_notes": "Ubah jadwal mesin ke batch malam.",
    "customer_notes": "Tambahkan packing kardus tebal."
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'customer_id' => 2,
            'product_id' => 3,

            'priority' => 'urgent',

Request      

PUT api/v1/percetakan/orders/{id}

PATCH api/v1/percetakan/orders/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The ID of the order. Example: 16

Body Parameters

customer_id   string  optional    

ID customer baru jika order dipindahkan. The id of an existing record in the percetakan_customers table. Example: 2

product_id   string  optional    

ID produk percetakan baru. The id of an existing record in the percetakan_products table. Example: 3

quantity   integer  optional    

Jumlah unit yang diperbarui. Must be at least 1. Example: 1500

status   string  optional    

Status order percetakan. Example: confirmed

Must be one of:
  • inquiry
  • quoted
  • confirmed
  • in_production
  • completed
  • ready_delivery
  • delivered
  • cancelled
deadline   string  optional    

Deadline produksi yang baru. Must be a valid date. Example: 2026-03-25

priority   string  optional    

Prioritas produksi. Example: urgent

Must be one of:
  • low
  • normal
  • high
  • urgent
is_rush_order   boolean  optional    

Example: true

specifications   object  optional    

Objek spesifikasi cetak yang diperbarui.

unit_price   number  optional    

Harga satuan baru. Must be at least 0. Example: 17500

discount_amount   number  optional    

Nominal diskon baru. Must be at least 0. Example: 75000

deposit_percentage   number  optional    

Persentase DP baru. Must be between 0 and 100. Example: 60

deposit_paid   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 27

production_notes   string  optional    

Catatan internal produksi. Example: Ubah jadwal mesin ke batch malam.

customer_notes   string  optional    

Catatan customer terbaru. Example: Tambahkan packing kardus tebal.

DELETE api/v1/percetakan/orders/{id}

Example request:

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/orders/16';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Body Parameters

order_id   string     

The id of an existing record in the percetakan_orders table. Example: architecto

stage   string     

Example: qc

Must be one of:
  • pre-press
  • printing
  • finishing
  • qc
  • packaging
machine_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the percetakan_machines table.

operator_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

supervisor_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

instructions   string  optional    

Example: architecto

Update the specified production job.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/production-jobs/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"stage\": \"qc\",
    \"status\": \"pending\",
    \"notes\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/production-jobs/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "stage": "qc",
    "status": "pending",
    "notes": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/production-jobs/16';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'stage' => 'qc',
            'status' => 'pending',
            'notes' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

The id of an existing record in the percetakan_machines table.

The id of an existing record in the users table.

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Store a newly created material.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/materials" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"b\",
    \"name\": \"n\",
    \"category\": \"consumable\",
    \"type\": \"g\",
    \"specification\": \"z\",
    \"unit\": \"sheet\",
    \"current_stock\": 77,
    \"min_stock\": 8,
    \"max_stock\": 76,
    \"unit_cost\": 60,
    \"last_purchase_price\": 42,
    \"supplier_id\": 16,
    \"location\": \"n\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/materials"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "b",
    "name": "n",
    "category": "consumable",
    "type": "g",
    "specification": "z",
    "unit": "sheet",
    "current_stock": 77,
    "min_stock": 8,
    "max_stock": 76,
    "unit_cost": 60,
    "last_purchase_price": 42,
    "supplier_id": 16,
    "location": "n"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/materials';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'code' => 'b',
            'name' => 'n',
            'category' => 'consumable',
            'type' => 'g',
            'specification' => 'z',
            'unit' => 'sheet',
            'current_stock' => 77,
            'min_stock' => 8,
            'max_stock' => 76,
            'unit_cost' => 60,
            'last_purchase_price' => 42,
            'supplier_id' => 16,
            'location' => 'n',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

POST api/v1/percetakan/materials

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: b

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: n

category   string     

Example: consumable

Must be one of:
  • paper
  • ink
  • plate
  • consumable
  • packaging
type   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: g

specification   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: z

unit   string     

Example: sheet

Must be one of:
  • ream
  • sheet
  • liter
  • kg
  • pcs
  • roll
  • box
current_stock   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 77

min_stock   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 8

max_stock   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 76

unit_cost   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 60

last_purchase_price   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 42

supplier_id   integer  optional    

Example: 16

location   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

Remove the specified material.

Example request:
curl --request DELETE \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/materials/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/materials/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "DELETE",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/materials/16';
$response = $client->delete(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [

        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Store a newly created customer.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"type\": \"retail\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"phone\": \"i\",
    \"company_name\": \"y\",
    \"npwp\": \"v\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\",
    \"city\": \"n\",
    \"province\": \"g\",
    \"postal_code\": \"zmiyvdljnikhwayk\",
    \"credit_limit\": 54,
    \"payment_terms_days\": 38,
    \"discount_percentage\": 0,
    \"notes\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "type": "retail",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "phone": "i",
    "company_name": "y",
    "npwp": "v",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvdljnikhwayk",
    "credit_limit": 54,
    "payment_terms_days": 38,
    "discount_percentage": 0,
    "notes": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'type' => 'retail',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'phone' => 'i',
            'company_name' => 'y',
            'npwp' => 'v',
            'address' => 'architecto',
            'city' => 'n',
            'province' => 'g',
            'postal_code' => 'zmiyvdljnikhwayk',
            'credit_limit' => 54,
            'payment_terms_days' => 38,
            'discount_percentage' => 0,
            'notes' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",

    "payment_terms_days": 38,
    "discount_percentage": 0,
    "notes": "architecto"
}

Request      

POST api/v1/percetakan/customers

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

type   string     

Example: retail

Must be one of:
  • retail
  • corporate
  • reseller
email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: i

company_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: y

npwp   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: v

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

city   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

province   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: g

postal_code   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: zmiyvdljnikhwayk

credit_limit   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 54

payment_terms_days   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 38

discount_percentage   number  optional    

Must be between 0 and 100. Example: 0

notes   string  optional    

Example: architecto

user_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

Display the specified customer.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers/16';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Update the specified customer.

Example request:
curl --request PUT \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers/16" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"b\",
    \"type\": \"reseller\",
    \"email\": \"zbailey@example.net\",
    \"phone\": \"i\",
    \"company_name\": \"y\",
    \"npwp\": \"v\",
    \"address\": \"architecto\",
    \"city\": \"n\",
    \"province\": \"g\",
    \"postal_code\": \"zmiyvdljnikhwayk\",
    \"credit_limit\": 54,
    \"payment_terms_days\": 38,
    \"discount_percentage\": 0,
    \"status\": \"inactive\",
    \"notes\": \"architecto\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers/16"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "b",
    "type": "reseller",
    "email": "zbailey@example.net",
    "phone": "i",
    "company_name": "y",
    "npwp": "v",
    "address": "architecto",
    "city": "n",
    "province": "g",
    "postal_code": "zmiyvdljnikhwayk",
    "credit_limit": 54,
    "payment_terms_days": 38,
    "discount_percentage": 0,
    "status": "inactive",
    "notes": "architecto"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "PUT",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/percetakan/customers/16';
$response = $client->put(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'json' => [
            'name' => 'b',
            'type' => 'reseller',
            'email' => 'zbailey@example.net',
            'phone' => 'i',
            'company_name' => 'y',
            'npwp' => 'v',
            'address' => 'architecto',
            'city' => 'n',
            'province' => 'g',
            'postal_code' => 'zmiyvdljnikhwayk',
            'credit_limit' => 54,
            'payment_terms_days' => 38,
            'discount_percentage' => 0,
            'status' => 'inactive',
            'notes' => 'architecto',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

Request      

PUT api/v1/percetakan/customers/{id}

PATCH api/v1/percetakan/customers/{id}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

id   integer     

The ID of the customer. Example: 16

Body Parameters

name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: b

type   string  optional    

Example: reseller

Must be one of:
  • retail
  • corporate
  • reseller
email   string  optional    

Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: zbailey@example.net

phone   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: i

company_name   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 255 characters. Example: y

npwp   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 50 characters. Example: v

address   string  optional    

Example: architecto

city   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: n

province   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 100 characters. Example: g

postal_code   string  optional    

Must not be greater than 20 characters. Example: zmiyvdljnikhwayk

credit_limit   number  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 54

payment_terms_days   integer  optional    

Must be at least 0. Example: 38

discount_percentage   number  optional    

Must be between 0 and 100. Example: 0

status   string  optional    

Example: inactive

Must be one of:
  • active
  • inactive
  • blacklisted
notes   string  optional    

Example: architecto

user_id   string  optional    

The id of an existing record in the users table.

Remove the specified customer.

curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview'
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('GET', url, headers=headers)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/public/books/{book_id}/preview

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

book_id   integer     

The ID of the book. Example: 3

GET /api/v1/public/books/{book}/preview-stream Publik — stream preview PDF langsung melalui Laravel.

Digunakan saat driver lokal agar tidak ada masalah CORS.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview-stream" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview-stream"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/preview-stream';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('GET', url, headers=headers)
response.json()

GET /api/v1/public/books/{book}/cover-image Direct image response for <img src>, supports private books disk and public imports.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/cover-image" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/cover-image"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/public/books/3/cover-image';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

GET /api/v1/books/{book}/read Protected — harus auth + punya akses beli.

PDF di-stream melalui Laravel agar MinIO URL tidak terekspos ke browser.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3/read" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3/read"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/books/3/read';
$response = $client->get(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));

import json

headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('GET', url, headers=headers)
response.json()

POST /api/v1/admin/books/{book}/upload-cover Admin only.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-cover" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "cover=@/tmp/phppsv3h8n1ttlrbFMbHkE" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-cover"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('cover', document.querySelector('input[name="cover"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-cover';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'cover',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phppsv3h8n1ttlrbFMbHkE', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-cover'
files = {
  'cover': open('/tmp/phppsv3h8n1ttlrbFMbHkE', 'rb')}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/admin/books/{book_id}/upload-cover

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

book_id   integer     

The ID of the book. Example: 3

Body Parameters

cover   file     

Must be a file. Example: /tmp/phppsv3h8n1ttlrbFMbHkE

POST /api/v1/admin/books/{book}/upload-pdf Admin only.

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-pdf" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "pdf=@/tmp/phpv4dtfk6kcmpg1ajLcnE" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-pdf"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('pdf', document.querySelector('input[name="pdf"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client();
$url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-pdf';
$response = $client->post(
    $url,
    [
        'headers' => [
            'Content-Type' => 'multipart/form-data',
            'Accept' => 'application/json',
        ],
        'multipart' => [
            [
                'name' => 'pdf',
                'contents' => fopen('/tmp/phpv4dtfk6kcmpg1ajLcnE', 'r')
            ],
        ],
    ]
);
$body = $response->getBody();
print_r(json_decode((string) $body));
import requests
import json

url = 'http://localhost:9000/api/v1/admin/books/3/upload-pdf'
files = {
  'pdf': open('/tmp/phpv4dtfk6kcmpg1ajLcnE', 'rb')}
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'multipart/form-data',
  'Accept': 'application/json'
}

response = requests.request('POST', url, headers=headers, files=files)
response.json()
